hero.title:
Architect of
the Unknown.
hero.subtitle: Digital transformation, IT systems architecture and large-scale project management. Solo or with an expert freelance team, I deliver robust and scalable solutions.

about.title:
Belkacem
Raber.
about.subtitle: With 7+ years of experience and a Master's in Networks & Systems, I manage complex IT projects from start to finish. My model is straightforward: I step in as architect, project manager, and tech lead. For large-scale projects, I activate a network of rigorously selected specialist freelancers — delivering agency-level power with expert precision.

biomes.title: How I Operate
biomes.1_desc: From UML modeling to tech stack selection, I design robust software foundations built to scale. Whether a SaaS, a B2B platform or a critical backend — every component is engineered to last.
biomes.2_desc: I oversee end-to-end technical execution: team management, code reviews, security by design (Keycloak, CI/CD Hardening) and ISO 27001 compliance for sensitive projects.
biomes.3_desc: Cloud infrastructure orchestration (AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions) and integration of generative AI agents to automate operations. From prototype to production, I make sure it holds.

clip.title: A GREAT PROJECT DESERVES AN ARCHITECT, NOT A CONTRACTOR.
clip.desc: The difference between a project that holds long-term and a permanent construction site is architecture planned from day one. I don't deliver code — I deliver reliability.

projects.title:
Systems
Built.
projects.subtitle: Systems designed, led and delivered. Each project is proof of technical mastery and the ability to handle complexity with methodology.
projects.p1_desc: Deployment of a High Availability AWS architecture (EKS, Terraform) for a financial platform. Result: 99.99% uptime, 25% reduction in cloud costs, and validated ISO 27001 audit.
projects.p2_desc: Led a team of 4 developers to transition a legacy monolith to microservices (Spring Boot). Improved response times by 60% under heavy loads (10k req/s).
projects.p3_desc: Design and implementation of a secure CI/CD pipeline. Integration of Keycloak (IAM) and end-to-end encryption. Zero critical vulnerabilities found during annual pentest.
projects.p4_desc: Research and development of an intrusion detection system on SDN networks via deep learning. A demonstration of AI applied to preventive cybersecurity.
projects.p5_desc: My own portfolio: a complete web system (i18n, GSAP animations, immersive design) demonstrating the ability to deliver a premium digital experience from A to Z.

souterrain.title:
The Technical
Arsenal.
souterrain.subtitle: A deep mastery of tools is what separates an architect from a developer. These are the invisible foundations behind every delivered project.

build.subtitle: I don't just deliver code. I deliver architectures designed to scale, resist heavy loads, and protect your sensitive data.
